utility_evaluation.REASONING: There are 5 items in the required format: health_coverage, property_coverage, travel_coverage, additional_services, total_budget. All 5 appear in the final coverage plan. Each item requires coverage details with costs. The plan provides for each: a named plan, benefits/coverage description, and a cost. The total_budget includes monthly and annual cost breakdown. Therefore, all items are fully specified according to the required details.

llm_ratings_evaluation.REASONING: The final coverage plan includes four items: LifeFirst Standard Plan (health), LifeFirst Standard Coverage (property), InsurePlus Standard Plan (travel), and Adventure Travel Coverage (additional services). I matched each to the corresponding entries in the ground-truth ratings: LifeFirst Standard Plan appears under primary_health_coverage (physical and mental) with rating 9; LifeFirst Standard Coverage appears under property_protection > home_content with rating 9; InsurePlus Standard Plan appears under mobility_coverage > travel_insurance with rating 10; Adventure Travel Coverage appears under travel_enhancement_services with rating 10.
